title: Add Graphiti MCP server to Claude Code settings in personal repo
userStory: As Steve, I want Claude Code wired to the brain via MCP so that agents can call mcp__graphiti__* tools.
acceptanceCriteria: ~/Repositories/personal/.claude/settings.json adds an mcpServers.graphiti entry pointing at https://brain.{domain}/mcp with Authorization: Bearer ${BRAIN_BEARER_TOKEN}
personal/CLAUDE.md documents that BRAIN_BEARER_TOKEN must be set in the shell before launching claude (env interpolation requirement)
Verify: in a new Claude Code session in personal/, prompt 'list the available MCP tools' returns mcp__graphiti__search_nodes, mcp__graphiti__search_facts, mcp__graphiti__add_episode
